videos.title: Top Bitcoin ETFs : IBIT vs FBTC
videos.text: let's do a quick comparison of two top Bitcoin ETFs ibit and fbtc both are backed by Major players in the asset management industry ibit is managed by Black Rock while fbtc is offered by Fidelity both ETFs boast solid assets under management and feature low expense ratios Black Rock and Fidelity are highly reputable asset managers known for attracting a diverse range of investors the trust and credibility associated with their strong reputations instill confidence resulting in significant asset inflows as a result both ibit and fbtc enjoy High liquidity and substantial trading activity making it easier for investors to trade without experiencing large price swings these ETFs directly invest in Bitcoin following the sec's approval of spot Bitcoin ETFs in January 2024 spot Bitcoin ETFs invest directly in physical Bitcoin as opposed to futures-based bitcoin ETFs they typically track bitcoin's real-time price movements directly reflecting changes in the spot Market year-to date iBot has delivered a 14% return with fbtc showing nearly identical performance over the past month both ETFs have dropped by roughly the same percentage during the market correction both are highly liquid making them easy to trade with minimal price disruption the main difference between Fidelity wise origin Bitcoin trust fbtc and black Rock's ey shares Bitcoin trust IBI lies in how their Bitcoin is custody Black Rock outsources the custody of its Bitcoin to the crypto exchange coinbase this partnership Builds on a strategic Alliance established in 2022 where black Rock's Aladdin clients gained access access to crypto trading and custody via coinbase Prime in contrast Fidelity uses self- custody for all its Bitcoin through Fidelity digital assets score they employ an Omnibus storage structure that combines both hot and cold storage aiming to balance security and accessibility thank you for watching this content is for educational and entertainment purposes only we do not recommend buying or selling any of these instrum struments or applying any of these strategies without consulting a certified financial adviser subscribe to our channel for more informative content in the future

videos.title: Blackrock�s Bitcoin ETF Rejected | Bitcoin to $1 Million in 2024!
videos.text: congratulations guys if you have it on to your Bitcoin until now you have successfully wedded the longest bear Market in bitcoin's history which saw a staggering 84 decline from the peak of its price to the bottom it's been a tough Journey with negative returns persisting for 490 consecutive days the last bracket was 353 day long bear Market between November 2014 and October 2015 making you a true crypto Survivor and still being in the game recently Bitcoin ETFs have been making headlines but Bitcoin ETFs have been all over the headlines recently as BlackRock Wisdom Tree and others rush to file their own this move has had a significant impact on the market causing Bitcoin to search by over 82 percent this year if approved this ETF could attract billions if not trillions of dollars in new Investments potentially leading to significant growth for Bitcoin however there's a catch before anyone can create ETF they must file and get approval from the SEC currently under the watch of Gary Gensler the process and criteria for approval will play a crucial role in determining the future of the spot Bitcoin ETF in today's video we will dive into what the SSC is looking for and explore potential future of price movements for Bitcoin so let's get started welcome to crypto kit Guru your ultimate channel for everything related to crypto FTS and metaverse today we are gearing up for the most significant and epic battle in the entire history of cryptocurrency the spot Bitcoin ETF in 2023 Bitcoin embarked on an extraordinary moonshot Journey with a substantial portion of its gains achieved after June 15th the Catalyst behind the search was the filing of an application for spot Bitcoin trust ETF by BlackRock the world's largest asset manager the very rumor of this prominent financial institution seeking an ETF had a profound impact on the price of Bitcoin the key figure behind blackrock's move is Larry Fink Who currently holds immense power globally his public endorsement of Bitcoin as a technology has been a game changer considering his previous Viewpoint that it was merely a tool for money laundering now I think it's stating that Bitcoin is playing a crucial role in democratizing the world of finance and the evolution of digital gold I actually believe this technology is going to be very important I believe the Next Generation for markets the Next Generation for Securities will be will be tokenization of securities the excitement surrounding blackrock's filing is Justified due to its remarkable drag record of ETF approvals with 575 ETFs successfully approved and only one rejected dating back to 2014. however it's essential to keep an eye on the two critical factors that will determine the ssc's approval of the spot Bitcoin ETF so stay tuned as we dive into what it will take for this groundbreaking ETF to receive the green light from the SSC the primary requirement the SSC is seeking is the surveillance sharing agreement which essentially means that a non-us entity must be willing to provide and share crucial information about market trading activities clearing activities and customer identity this sharing of information should not be hindered significantly by the non-us entities rules of secrecy essentially it demands that even if a party is not legally obligated to comply with the ssc's regulation they must still cooperate and provide all the necessary data this data will be shared with a NASDAQ to enable a comprehensive study of bitcoin's trading activities and the identities of the participants involved transparency is the ssc's top priority before granting approval for the ETF the second major concern for the SEC relates to an issue that has been persisted since bitcoin's Inception yes we are talking about insider trading solidus Labs recently released the first part of the company's 2023 crypto Market manipulation report but the focus on insider trading activity in the space Stardust Labs recently published the first part of its shedding light on insider trading activity within the crypto space the findings were concerning revealing that insider trading is more pervasive in the crypto world then previously believed looking back to 2021 the report discovered that over 50 percent of crypto token listings showed signs of insider trading specifically more than 130 projects have shown evidence of insider trading where individuals bought a held a large number of tokens before their release only to later dump on the market of non-decentralized exchanges this unlawful activity results in some individuals making illegal profits exceeding 200 000 US Dollars consequently this increased inside trading activity has become a significant obstacle in gaining approval for the ETF to combat this greater transparency is required between wallet owners and their identities especially as more people plan to include Bitcoin in their pensions fund and retirement accounts and late last week BlackRock and NASDAQ refiled naming coinbase as the custodial surveillance partner of the spot Bitcoin trust to dress as problem BlackRock and other headphones have selected coinbase as the surveillance program pattern this move may prove advantages for coinbase as their stock has experienced substantial growth the JPMorgan did say the moves to make coinbase a surveillance partner for these funds has led to the quote bullish momentum of the company's share price in recent weeks at the beginning of the year coinbase stock was valued at around 33 dollars per share and has risen to approximately 80 per share representing a remarkable 135 percent increase however despite this impressive growth investing in coimbus remains inherently risky JP Morgan for example holds the Viewpoint that the majority of retail investors including individuals like you and I have already found ways to access and invest in Bitcoin hence they argue that the approval of spot Bitcoin ETF may not lead to a significant influx of retail money waiting on the sidelines similarly despite the presence of Bitcoin ETS in the form of Futures institutional hedge fund money hasn't flown into Bitcoin as anticipated this indicates that the approval of spot Bitcoin ETF may not automatically trigger search of institutional investments into Bitcoin thus it's important to consider the risk associated with the approval or rejection of the ETF if the ATF gets approved there's no guarantee that bitcoin's price will experience a substantial increase on the other hand if the ETF is rejected there's a possibility that bitcoin's price could plummet below 30 000 US Dollars rapidly on the flip side you might have come across numerous insane predictions for Bitcoin if the spot Bitcoin ETF gets approved while it's challenging to determine the accuracy of these predictions one of the most compelling comparisons is with a history of gold consider the birth of the first gold spot ETF on November 18 2004 when gold was valued at less than 450 dollars per ounce within just seven years by 2011 the price of gold had skyrocketed to nearly two thousand dollars per ounce representing a staggering four and a half times increase gold serves as a relevant historical example and in my opinion I believe bitcoin's price growth could potentially outpace even that of gold one of the reasons for this belief is the sheer magnitude of assets match by the companies applying for their own ETFs totaling approximately 27 trillion dollars although not all of this Capital would flow into Bitcoin even a small fraction say one percent could have a profound impact on its price the ultimate question now is when we will receive the decision on the spot Bitcoin etf's approval this decision holds great significance for the cryptocurrency market and investors worldwide eagerly waiting to witness its outcome now let's take a look at the potential timeline for the etf's approval the SEC has three opportunities to extend the deadline once in August once in September and once in December however the final and definitive deadline for the decision is set for 23rd of February 2024. coincidentally this state is close to bitcoin's next halving event expected in April 2024 estimates for bitcoin's price range anywhere from 35 000 to 45 000 US dollars per coin in 2024 which could become the potential lower price in theory should the spot Bitcoin ETF be approved might have a positive impact on bitcoin's price over the long term similar to the effect the ETF had on goal by making it more accessible to a wider audience nevertheless as with all things in crypto and bitcoin's best it's crucial to remain cautiously optimistic the odds of the ETF being approved currently stand about 50 50 meaning the outcome remains uncertain therefore it's essential to exercise caution so please stay safe out there and see you until the next time bye bye guys

videos.title: Bitcoin ETF Updates: Bitcoin ETF Major Holdings Surge! Blackrock & Fidelity Lead 2024 Crypto Race
videos.text: black rocks ey shares Bitcoin trust recently demonstrated a powerful commitment to bitcoin ETF by adding 228 BTC valued around $13.7 million improving their total Holdings to a staggering 37,2 6 BTC currently valued at approximately $18.5 billion this strategic move showcases black Rock's aggressive stance in the Bitcoin ETF Arena and emphasizes their belief in bitcoin's long-term potential on July 3rd nine minent Bitcoin ETFs collectively added 208 BTC cumulatively worth around $12.5 million inferring a growing institutional interest in Bitcoin investment as these ETFs look to capitalize on its potential but Black Rock isn't the only key player making substantial moves in the Bitcoin investment space Fidelity's wise origin Bitcoin fund also demonstrated significant activity on July second adding a hefty 1,28 BTC valued at $62 million enhancing their total to 168,00 BTC valued at $10.5 billion does this bold accumulation hinted Fidelity strategic foresight in the crypto race for 2024 in contrast to Black Rock and Fidelity's aggressive accumulation in Bitcoin ETFs GRE scale's Bitcoin trust has shown some reduction notably on July 2nd GRE scale's Bitcoin trust saw a notable outflow of 487 BTC losing about $30.32 million this reduction continued on July 3rd with a minor decrease of 11 BTC costing approximately $678,000 despite these reductions grayscale still holds a formidable 275,557 highlights varying strategic approaches for instance while black rocks I shares Bitcoin trust and Fidelity wise origin Bitcoin fund witnessed positive net inflows signaling robust institutional confidence in Bitcoin ETF others like the Invesco Galaxy Bitcoin ETF experienced net outflows this Divergence in movement might reflect different strategies across Bitcoin Investments and how they impact bitcoin price sentiment and future valuations moreover The Arc 21 shares Bitcoin ETF has also been notable in securing positive net inflows reinforcing its position in the cryptocurrency ETF Market this influx might indicate growing investor trust in Arc strategy and vision for Bitcoin ETF the collective inflow into these ETFs showcases the substantial traction Bitcoin is gaining in institutional Bitcoin regulation circles possibly a precursor to larger institutional adoption in the crypto ETF space amid this Dynamic landscape questions about the future of Bitcoin ETF and its role as a significant digital currency ETF asset class persist with institutions like Black Rock and Fidelity leading the charge and varying strategies at play we witness the growing complexity and maturity of the crypto portfolio Market is Bitcoin ETF on the brink of widespread institutional adoption or are we witnessing the beginning of a massive consolidation phase these intriguing updates make it clear that the race for Bitcoin ETF Supremacy among major financial institutions is heating up as we head into 2024 this this battle for dominance driven by substantial Bitcoin Futures Investments and strategic positioning could potentially reshape the landscape of cryptocurrency Investments understanding these shifts offers valuable insights into the Strategic decisions shaping the future of Bitcoin ETF and a broader crypto assets Market if this insightful breakdown was valuable to you don't forget to like the video subscribe to our channel for more indepth Bitcoin market analysis

Wisdom Tree bitwise Asset Management Valkyrie grayscale are some of the applications that are being submitted now chair Gary Gensler comes out and by the way Gary Gensler is L by the xrp folks he's a shouldn't be taken as an indication the agency is backing off crypto enforcement here's this quote today's action does not approve or endorse crypto trading platforms or intermediaries which for the key the reason why this is important when you look at all the asset classes of different Generations this is what you'll find there's roughly 156 trillion dollars in US assets and you can see the dark the ETFs they have here's what it's looking like on their initial trading day Thursday Bitcoin ETFs recorded inflows exceeding $4.3 billion establishing an unprecedented milestone for exchange traded funds products black rock inks I share Bitcoin trust ETF attracted over a billion dollars and great skilles Bitcoin trust experiened inflow surpassing $2 billion the reason why this is important is take a look at some of the dates here and see what happened on June 16th 2023 Black Rock filed for a spot Bitcoin ETF they called it I shares Bitcoin trust at the time Bitcoin was trading at $225,500 but quickly shot up Beyond $3,000 Bitcoin has gained roughly 63% since Black Rock filed its ETF application and black rock names JP Morgan as authorized participating for spot Bitcoin ETF which means in a way JP Morgan Chase and black rock is saying Bitcoin is here to stay it's not going anywhere however this can't all be good right like you got to sit there and say there's got to be something bad about this doesn't hurt any aspect of Bitcoin here's what Arthur Hayes had to say he's the co-founder of bitmex he says Black Rock will completely destroy Bitcoin now why is that based on their direct and indirect investment it is estimated that BlackRock State Street and Vanguard collectively own 1 and 2% of all Bitcoin in circulation Hay's argument is that if Black Rock which is in the asset accumulation game vacuums up all the Bitcoin there will be no more Bitcoin transactions and those who secure the Bitcoin Network in return for fees and newly minted Bitcoin known as miners would be unable to afford the energy it cost to secure the network as a result they would shut off their machines without the miners the network dies and Bitcoin vanishes so now why is he saying this what's the big deal with miners like what do you mean if they don't do anything with it are miners that important look how much Bitcoin devours electricity more than many countries out there when you look at this chart at the top you'll see annual electricity consumption in comparison China's number one US is 2 Germany's three all the world's data centers is for look what's next Bitcoin more than Norway more than Bangladesh more than Switzerland more than Google more than Facebook it's more than Google and Facebook combined times8 that's a lot of energy so his argument comes back to how Bitcoin transactions work to limit inflation Bitcoin coin Creator designed Bitcoin to only have 21 million Bitcoins however Bitcoin only exists If It Moves when a Bitcoin transaction is made miners take the information and apply a mathematical formula verifying the transaction and adding it to the blockchain this process is known as proof of work it's called that because the process of mining is very hard and timec consuming requiring large amounts of processing power and time multiple confirmations other miners verifying the blocks are typically needed for transaction to be considered secure as a reward for their services miners are paid in Bitcoin for each new block they add to the blockchain so now there's a lot of predictions being made about is this thing going to hit $100,000 before the end of the year or not there's one chart that shows it will because of the history of what happens to bitcoin when it goes through haling let me kind of explain to you what this means the size of Bitcoin block rewards is Haled after the creation of every 210,000 blocks which takes around four years at bitcoin's Inception in 2009 each block reward was worth 50 Bitcoins in May 2020 the block reward was held a third time to 6.25 Bitcoins in 2023 there were 19.4 million Bitcoins in existence 92% of the total plan Supply the block reward is scheduled to reach zero around May of 2140 but mining will likely no longer be profitable long before that date is reached as of April 2039 about 99.6% of Bitcoins will already have been issued and the block reward will be just .19 95 3 1 2 5 0 Bitcoins so when you look at this chart this is what you'll notice first haling that took place November 208 2012 Bitcoin was roughly $12.22 now four years later July 9th of 2016 Bitcoin at the time
